title: Similar Direction To This Scene
wikitext: []: Similar Direction To This Scene?             Quote Post by Clover » Thu Aug 16, 2018 4:59 am I recently noticed a very similar direction between these two scenes (with the recent release of the Mega Man X Legacy Collection) https://youtu.be/agNdOFrQv20?t=32 (and the scene where Ritsuko is called from the prison cell to repair the Magi in End of Evangelion (where she calls Gendo an egotist; can't find a clip on youtube, but you evafreaks know the scene.) Is this based on a prior film scene from a western or Japanese film, or is the scene in Maverick Hunter actually inspired by EoE/Episode 4 [where Misato talks to Shinji in his cell]? FreakyFilmFan, I'm calling on you here... (Maverick Hunter was released in 2005, 8 years after EoE, and the anime cutscenes were produced by Xebec, who I believe also worked on EoE)

Article: Similar Direction To This Scene
[]: Similar Direction To This Scene?             Quote Post by Clover » Thu Aug 16, 2018 4:59 am I recently noticed a very similar direction between these two scenes (with the recent release of the Mega Man X Legacy Collection) https://youtu.be/agNdOFrQv20?t=32 (and the scene where Ritsuko is called from the prison cell to repair the Magi in End of Evangelion (where she calls Gendo an egotist; can't find a clip on youtube, but you evafreaks know the scene.) Is this based on a prior film scene from a western or Japanese film, or is the scene in Maverick Hunter actually inspired by EoE/Episode 4 [where Misato talks to Shinji in his cell]? FreakyFilmFan, I'm calling on you here... (Maverick Hunter was released in 2005, 8 years after EoE, and the anime cutscenes were produced by Xebec, who I believe also worked on EoE)
